MasterPortDestroyer is armed
UltraGrid 1.10.3 (tags/v1.10.3 rev 12e2705 built Feb 20 2026 15:07:39)

Core Audio playback usage:
	-r coreaudio[:<index>|:<name>] [--param audio-buffer-len=<len_ms>] [--param audio-disable-adaptive-buffer]
where
	<name> - device name substring (case sensitive)

Available CoreAudio playback devices:
	coreaudio    : Default CoreAudio playback
	coreaudio:100: BlackHole 16ch
	coreaudio:116: BlackHole 2ch
	coreaudio:132: BlackHole 64ch
	coreaudio:88 : MacBook Pro Speakers
	coreaudio:148: Microsoft Teams Audio
	coreaudio:162: NDI Audio
	coreaudio:175: ZoomAudioDevice
	coreaudio:61 : Hauptgeraet
Exit
MasterPortDestroyer triggered
